Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Red Divine Titan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Red Divine Titan is a one-hundred-fifty-foot humanoid armor with silver and red plates.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The Red Titan is a scarlet mech that radiates light through sunlight veins and normally stays in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Red Titan is a Divine Titan used by Raion that was pure scarlet and lacked orange veins in the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Red Titan is a Divine Titan used by Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — The Red Divine Titan is a pilotable vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Red Titan is slicing through the D�Niss army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Red Titan is enhanced by the blood of the solar dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Red Titan uses a sunlight-colored sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Red Divine Titan has veins of liquid sunlight running through it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Red Divine Titan can burn brightly.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Red Titan is one of two Divine Titans on the narrator's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Red Titan is being repaired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — The Red Divine Titan is clashing against Aila in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — The Red Divine Titan is a mech that was repaired by Doctor Cryce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — The Red Divine Titan has an emergency recall function to return it to Shadow Ark.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
